get.summary: Compute All Sample File Peaks Route

post.summary: Get Sample File Peak Timeseries Route

post.description:
Uploads a sample file to the server.

This route takes an uploaded file from a form field and saves it in the `filestreams` directory
on the server. It validates the file's size and extension before uploading.

:param file: The file to be uploaded, provided in a form field.
:type file: UploadFile
:return: A JSON response indicating the success or failure of the upload.
:rtype: JSONResponse

UserCreate.title: UserCreate
UserCreate.description: Schema for creating a new user. Provides fields required for user registration.

id.title: Id
id.description: Unique identifier of the user (Primary Key).

email.title: Email
email.description: User's email address. This is used as the unique login credential in the authentication flow. Although the specs of OAuth2 login form refers to this as `username`, it actually expects the user's email address here for authentication.

is_active.title: Is Active
is_active.description: Indicates if the user account is active and can log in.

is_superuser.title: Is Superuser
is_superuser.description: Designates whether the user has superuser privileges.

is_verified.title: Is Verified
is_verified.description: Indicates whether the user's email is verified.

username.title: Username
username.description: Name of the user, used for display purposes (not for login).

role_id.title: Role Id
role_id.description: Role identifier of the user, linked to user role permissions.

registered_at.title: Registered At
registered_at.description: Timestamp indicating when the user registered.

UserRead.title: UserRead
UserRead.description: Schema to read user data, typically used in responses to provide user details.

password.title: Password
password.description: New password for the user. If not provided, the password remains unchanged.

email.title: Email
email.description: Updated email address. If not provided, the current email remains unchanged.

is_active.title: Is Active
is_active.description: Set to True or False to activate or deactivate the user account.

is_superuser.title: Is Superuser
is_superuser.description: Set to True to grant or revoke superuser privileges.

is_verified.title: Is Verified
is_verified.description: Set to True or False to mark the user as verified or not.

username.title: Username
username.description: Updated username for display purposes. Note: This is not used for login.

role_id.title: Role Id
role_id.description: Updated role ID to assign a new role to the user.

UserUpdate.title: UserUpdate
UserUpdate.description: Schema for updating existing user information. Fields can be partially updated.
